## Problem statement

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and how often?
Example: "As a user running many agents in parallel, I have no way to pause a single agent without stopping the whole team." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as you can — include UI sketches, API shapes, or pseudocode if helpful. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why did you prefer your proposed solution? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to related issues, prior art in other tools, screenshots, etc. -->
